Name: Lens Simulation
Description: Simulates camera lens depth-of-field and optical blur using Circle of Confusion (CoC), aperture shaping, and near/far focus control. Supports physically-inspired parameters such as f-number, film size, and temporal stabilization for cinematic focus effects.

Fields.Name: Near Focus: End Distance
Fields.Description: End distance of the near focus range where objects begin transitioning into blur.

Fields.Name: Near Focus: Start Distance
Fields.Description: Start distance for near-field depth-of-field transition. Objects closer than this are fully blurred.

Fields.Name: Far Focus: Start Distance
Fields.Description: Start distance for far-field depth-of-field blur. Objects beyond this begin losing focus.

Fields.Name: Far Focus: End Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum far blur distance where defocus reaches full intensity.

Fields.Name: Focus Distance
Fields.Description: Primary focus distance of the virtual camera. Objects at this depth appear sharp.

Fields.Name: Use Camera Focus
Fields.Description: When enabled, the focus distance is automatically derived from the camera's internal focus system.

Fields.Name: Sky Mask Rate
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly the sky is excluded or reduced from depth-of-field calculations.

Fields.Name: Lens F-Number
Fields.Description: Simulated camera aperture f-number. Lower values create stronger blur (shallow depth-of-field), higher values increase sharpness.

Fields.Name: Aperture Value
Fields.Description: Photographic aperture value controlling exposure and depth-of-field intensity in a logarithmic scale.

Fields.Name: Film Size
Fields.Description: Virtual sensor/film size in millimeters. Larger sensors produce shallower depth-of-field for the same aperture.

Fields.Name: Aperture Shape
Fields.Description: Defines the shape of the simulated lens aperture (e.g., circular, polygonal), affecting bokeh shape.

Fields.Name: Diaphragm Rotate
Fields.Description: Rotation of the aperture blades, affecting the orientation of bokeh highlights.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Blur Count Pre-Mask
Fields.Description: Number of blur samples applied before foreground/background masking is applied.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Blur Count 1
Fields.Description: Primary blur pass sample count for CoC-based depth-of-field.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Blur Count 2
Fields.Description: Secondary blur pass sample count for refined depth-of-field smoothing.

Fields.Name: Circle of Confusion: Mode
Fields.Description: Selects the method used to compute circle of confusion (linear, physically-based, or artistic approximation).

Fields.Name: Motion Blur Intensity
Fields.Description: Controls the overall strength of motion blur. Higher values increase streak length and temporal blending of fast-moving objects.

Fields.Name: Shutter Speed
Fields.Description: Simulates camera shutter exposure time. Slower shutter speeds increase motion blur strength, while faster speeds reduce it.

Fields.Name: Solve Single Step
Fields.Description: Forces the lens simulation solver to evaluate blur and focus calculations in a single update step instead of iterative accumulation.
